title: Old Piston Sound Engine
description: Bringing back the amazing piston sounds of versions before 1.14!
body:
A mod bringing back the OLD old piston sounds. Pre 1.14, along with the "cut off" of the piston sounds, when too many pistons fire in the same gametick. Keep in mind, this may not work perfectly 100% of the time! To toggle these settings or show their state dont add arguments do:
`/oldpistons cutoffPistons [true/false]`
`/oldpistons changePistonPitch [true/false]`
`/oldpistons cutoffSmoothLastPiston [true/false]`
`/oldpistons pistonSoundThreshold [int]`
`/oldpistons cutoffTime [int]`
